description.ko: 디지털 시대 자연의 진화를 시각화한 FLORA-9은 유기적인 꽃잎 구조와 수정체 회로, 박동하는 데이터 스트림을 결합하여 생명과 코드의 교차점을 상징합니다.
description.en: A visionary representation of nature's evolution in the digital age, FLORA-9 blends organic petal structures with crystalline circuitry and pulsing data streams, symbolizing the intersection of life and code.

prompt: A high-tech digital flower named FLORA-9, translucent bioluminescent petals with glowing neon blue and violet veins resembling complex circuit boards, metallic silver stem with fiber-optic roots, floating in a dark void surrounded by shimmering data particles and holographic prisms, macro photography, ultra-realistic, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, futuristic cyber-garden aesthetic.
